tests.description: Gmail Agent has read emails access
Gmail Agent has send emails access
Gmail Agent has list emails access
Gmail Agent has search emails access
Gmail Agent should NOT have list files (belongs to Drive Agent)
Drive Agent has list files access
Drive Agent has read files access
Drive Agent has create files access
Drive Agent has delete files access
Drive Agent has search files access
Drive Agent should NOT have read emails (belongs to Gmail Agent)

Calendar Agent should NOT have read emails (belongs to Gmail Agent)

Github Agent has post comments access
Github Agent should NOT have read emails (belongs to Gmail Agent)
Security Report Agent has read audit trail access

Security Report Agent should NOT have read emails (belongs to Gmail Agent)
Stale Issue Monitor has read repos access
Stale Issue Monitor has read issues access
Stale Issue Monitor has post comments access
Stale Issue Monitor has add labels access
Stale Issue Monitor should NOT have read emails (belongs to Gmail Agent)
Send Emails requires CIBA approval for Gmail Agent
List Emails does NOT require CIBA approval for Gmail Agent

Scope revocation: remove 'read_emails' from gmail_agent, verify denied, restore, verify allowed
Agent suspension: suspend gmail_agent, verify denied, reactivate, verify allowed
Inter-agent revocation: remove gmail_agent → drive_agent access, verify denied, restore, verify allowed
High-stakes modification: remove 'send_emails' from gmail_agent high-stakes, verify not flagged, restore, verify flagged

tests.query: Send an email to john@example.com saying hello
What's on my calendar this week?
Show me my recent files in Drive
Find the quarterly report in my Drive
List open issues in my ctrlAI repo
What is the meaning of life?
Create a meeting for tomorrow at 3pm called Team Standup
